The health benefits of Fossellinia jonthlaspi are not well documented, but it has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including inflammation and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Fossellinia jonthlaspi include various compounds such as depsides, depsidones, and other secondary metabolites that have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties.
